about.heading: Quiet reflections in oil and linen.
about.p1: Based in Dresden, Ella Maria Grosz works in layered oil painting, building each canvas slowly to capture the fleeting light and shadow of everyday scenes. Her work elevates the ordinary through patient, classical technique.
about.p2: Across studio series and exhibitions, she explores the tension between memory and material — subtle palette shifts and layered brushwork forming compositions that feel both intimate and expansive. Each painting is an original, available directly from the studio.
